scripts.log:demo: node -e "import('./logging_middleware/index.js').then(({configureLogger, Log}) => { configureLogger({ token: process.env.APP_LOG_TOKEN || process.env.APP_API_TOKEN || process.env.AFFORDMED_LOG_TOKEN || '' }); return Log('backend','info','utils','demo log call'); }).then((value) => { console.log(JSON.stringify(value, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error.message); process.exit(1); });"
